headline: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Eli Lilly, Costco Wholesale, Morgan Stanley and Kewaunee Scientific
summary: Eli Lilly's expanding GLP-1 portfolio and pipeline remain in focus as demand stays strong ahead of its second-quarter earnings results.

headline: Costco Officially Launched Standalone Gas Stations. Don’t Count on This Fueling Another Leg Higher in COST Stock.
summary: Costco expands beyond traditional warehouse-attached fuel sites on June 24 by officially opening its first standalone, members-only gas station with 40 pumps in Mission Viejo, California.

raw.headline: Costco Officially Launched Standalone Gas Stations. Don’t Count on This Fueling Another Leg Higher in COST Stock.
raw.summary: Costco expands beyond traditional warehouse-attached fuel sites on June 24 by officially opening its first standalone, members-only gas station with 40 pumps in Mission Viejo, California.

headline: Costco Stock: Next Stop $1,100?
summary: Investors are hoping the dominant retailer can get back to its winning ways.
